delete.title: Delete Records
delete.desc: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} record(s)? This action cannot be undone.

import.title: Import to {{table}}
import.dropZone: Drop file here or click to upload

softDelete.confirmPermanent: This will permanently delete the record. This cannot be undone.

aiAnalyzer.title: AI Data Analyzer
aiAnalyzer.description: AI will analyze the "{{table}}" table for potential issues: duplicates, outliers, missing indexes, and NULL patterns.

kanban.label: Kanban
kanban.noStatusColumn: No text column found. Kanban view requires a text column to group by.

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.noDateColumn: No date column found. Calendar view requires a date/timestamp column.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.noImageColumn: No image/URL column found. Gallery view requires a text column with URLs.

errors.PG_22003: Value out of range. Integer columns support values from -2,147,483,648 to 2,147,483,647. Use bigint for larger numbers.
errors.PG_22001: Value too long for column{{column ? ' "' + column + '"' : ''}}. Reduce the text length or change column type to "text".
errors.PG_22P02: Invalid value format. Check that the value matches the column type.
errors.PG_22007: Invalid date/time format. Use ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.
errors.PG_23502: Column "{{column}}" cannot be empty (NOT NULL constraint).
errors.PG_23503: Foreign key violation: the referenced record does not exist or cannot be deleted.
errors.PG_23505: This value already exists — duplicate values are not allowed.
errors.PG_23514: Value does not meet the check constraint{{constraint ? ' "' + constraint + '"' : ''}}.
errors.PG_42701: A column with this name already exists.
errors.PG_42830: Target column must have a UNIQUE or PRIMARY KEY constraint.
errors.PG_42710: Object with this name already exists.
errors.PG_2BP01: Cannot delete — dependent objects exist (indexes, foreign keys, or views). Remove them first.
errors.PG_53200: Server out of memory. Try a smaller operation.
errors.PG_42601: SQL syntax error. Check your expression.
errors.PG_57014: Query exceeded time limit and was cancelled. Optimize your query or contact admin to increase quota.
errors.PG_57P01: Server is shutting down. Try again later.
errors.QUOTA_CONCURRENT: Too many concurrent requests. Wait for current requests to finish.
errors.QUOTA_TIMEOUT: Query timed out. Try simplifying your query or reducing the data set.
errors.QUOTA_EXCEEDED: Resource limit reached. Contact admin to increase your quota.
